meaning: n.鍩哄洜娓楀叆,娓愭笚鐜拌薄
examples: And also typical wild soybeans were inferred to have had introgression from cultivated soybeans.
The role of introgression in shaping the genetic variation pattern of the species should be seen in the same light.
Meanwhile, MAALs can be used to study the introgression mechanism and the pairing status of homologous chromosomes.
